info.name: WhatsApp Business API Documentation
info.description: Postman Collection For Official WhatsApp Business API.

item.name: Create Template
item.description:
For more details on template creation via API, Kindly go through the official documentation on Facebook

[https://developers.facebook.com/docs/whatsapp/business-management-api/message-templates/#retrieve-templates](https://developers.facebook.com/docs/whatsapp/business-management-api/message-templates/#retrieve-templates)

item.name: Phone Number Associated With WhatsApp Business API

query.description: UNIX Timestamp
UNIX Timestamp

The granularity by which you would like to retrieve the analytics.
1. HALF_HOUR
2. DAY
3. MONTH

The countries for which you would like to retrieve analytics. Provide an array with 2 letter country codes for the countries you would like to include. If not provided, analytics will be returned for all countries you have communicated with. (Optional)

The types of messages (notification messages and/or customer support messages) for which you want to retrieve notifications. Provide an array and include 0 for notification messages, and 2 for customer support messages. If not provided, analytics will be returned for all messages together.
UNIX Timestamp
UNIX Timestamp

The granularity by which you would like to retrieve the analytics.
1. HALF_HOUR
2. DAILY
3. MONTHLY
(Comma Seperated Values.) Optional.  List of metrics you would like to receive. If you send an empty list, we return results for all metric types.

(Comma Seperated Values.) Optional.  List of conversation categories. If you send an empty list, we return results for all conversation categories.
1. AUTHENTICATION
2. MARKETING
3. SERVICE
4. UTILITY

(Comma Seperated Values.) Optional. List of conversation types. If you send an empty list, we return results for all conversation types.
1. FREE_ENTRY_POINT
2. FREE_TIER: 
3. REGULAR:
(Comma Seperated Values.) Optional. List of conversation directions. If you send an empty list, we return results for all conversation directions.

(Comma Seperated Values.) Optional. List of breakdowns you would like to apply to your metrics. If you send an empty list, we return results without any breakdowns.
1. CONVERSATION_CATEGORY
2. CONVERSATION_DIRECTION
3. CONVERSATION_TYPE
4. COUNTRY
5. PHONE

formdata.description:
A list of Flow categories. Multiple values are possible, but at least one is required. Choose the values which represent your business use case. 
Allowed values: "SIGN_UP", "SIGN_IN", "APPOINTMENT_BOOKING", "LEAD_GENERATION", "CONTACT_US", "CUSTOMER_SUPPORT", "SURVEY", "OTHER"

A list of Flow categories. Multiple values are possible, but at least one is required. Choose the values which represent your business use case. 
Allowed values: "SIGN_UP", "SIGN_IN", "APPOINTMENT_BOOKING", "LEAD_GENERATION", "CONTACT_US", "CUSTOMER_SUPPORT", "SURVEY", "OTHER"

query.description: Custom Field ID
Custom Field Value

Accepted Conditions : ['equal to','not equal to','start with','end with','is empty','is not empty','contains','does not contains','greater than','greater than or equal to','less than','less than or equal to','is null','is not null','exist','does not exist']

request.description: If you have initiated an upload session but it is taking longer than expected or has been interrupted, send a GET request and append your upload session ID. The API returns a file_offset value that you can use to resume the upload process from the point of interruption.
